What this is

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep the contact-form inquiry, consultation interview, contract, and 50% deposit on one record so nothing gets lost between email and invoicing.
  • Track Birth Plus, Birth Essentials, Everything But the Birth, A Better Night, and hourly postpartum clients on one board without a second spreadsheet.
  • Keep class-discount eligibility, scholarship-fund review, and gift-registry handoffs attached to the same family record.
